note: Phase A0 round-2 iteration after Phase A.5 reviewer verdict (comment 8bd7a35c, findings 1-12). Re-cataloged the 9 stakeholder metrics with: (1) single locked sign convention sourced from dealer_assumption block (sign_dealer(call)=-1, sign_dealer(put)=+1) — finding 1; (2) dealer_net_gamma scope-distinct (front-month-only) from net_gex (full-chain), in shares-per-1% units — finding 2; (3) gamma_flip renamed to gex_zero_cross_strike with strike-axis semantics matching the algorithm — finding 3; (4) concrete v7/v8 API endpoint URLs in asset fields, loop semantics in notes — finding 10; (5) iv_rank link_status phase-gated unsupported-then-proxy — finding 6; (6) neutral phrasing for dim_macro_events — finding 12. Metric distribution: exact (4): spot, max_pain, pc_ratio_oi, hv20; proxy (1): iv30; unsupported (4): net_gex, gex_zero_cross_strike, dealer_net_gamma, iv_rank-cold-start. Awaiting Phase A.5 re-review before mart.yml.phase advances.

Phase A round-2 iteration. BRD now version 0.2 with §B-1 changelog row documenting the round-2 fixes. §B-2 carries a 'Dealer Assumption' subsection that locks the GEX sign convention single-sourced from source_catalog.dealer_assumption (closes finding 1). §B-3 row for net_gex carries the full formula with sign_dealer(type) as a derived value; row for dealer_net_gamma documents scope-distinct (front-month-only) + unit-distinct (shares-per-1%) framing (closes finding 2); row for gex_zero_cross_strike (renamed from gamma_flip) carries strike-axis semantics and 'Strike-axis GEX zero cross @ current spot' dashboard label (closes finding 3); row for iv30 pins linear-in-total-variance interpolation (closes finding 5); row for iv_rank carries phase-gated link_status with explicit cold-start→proxy transition (closes finding 6); row for spot carries Yahoo v8 chart endpoint OHLC for same-trading_date semantics (closes finding 9). §B-4 L-4 carries the T1.6b parametric-sensitivity mitigation (closes finding 4). §B-4 L-6 + L-7 added to document spot-comparator alignment and freshness-threshold unification. brd_signed=false; awaiting reviewer approval before signature.

Phase A item-A patch + sign (reviewer comment 751fbe78). Rephrased L-7 + TEST PLAN §Tier 2 as a single inequality on `last_pull_ts_utc - most_recent_session_close` to remove the round-2 'pull_age' / 'age vs lag' ambiguity; same predicate, same data — STALE iff T2.1 inequality false. BRD version bumped to 0.3, signature block filled per reviewer pre-authorisation. mart.yml.phase = A_signed, brd_signed = true at commit 6e777a0.

Phase B TDD draft against the signed BRD. T-1..T-21 all populated. Two ODS contract tables (chain snapshot, price history) per T-9; column catalog in 6-col format across T-9..T-14. T-3 ports the nine BRD §B-3 metrics with SQL-grade `calculation_logic`. T-13 has explicit SQL/formula for max_pain (per-side dedup CTE — closes T3.3 / `bae4af2` cardinality bug), iv30 (linear-in-total-variance interpolation), net_gex (full-chain SUM with locked sign_dealer), dealer_net_gamma (front-month SUM with provenance n_rows_used + scope_label for T3.4), and gex_zero_cross_strike (deterministic tie-break = nearest spot, lower strike on equidistant ties — closes reviewer item C). T-14 ADS exposes `pull_lag_hours` + `is_stale` driven by BRD L-7 inequality and `iv_rank_link_status_active` as a deterministic CASE expression — owned by Phase D /mart-dqc per reviewer item E. T-18 DQC plan carries 1%-of-abs(dealer_net_gamma) epsilon for T3.4 (item B), scope-distinct provenance check, and T1.6b denominator floor at 1e6 USD (item D). T-19 lists 15 test cases (12 dbt + 3 Python). tdd_signed=false; awaiting Phase B.5 review.

Phase B round-2 TDD iteration per orchestrator directive `15c917df` against Phase B.5 round-1 reviewer verdict `b61820e9` (2 blockers + 3 majors + 2 minors). Closes findings: (1) max_pain formula terms swapped in T-3 row 46 + T-13 line 365 step 2 — `pain(K) = SUM_calls(oi · max(0, K − K_under)) + SUM_puts(oi · max(0, K_under − K))`; K is candidate underlying close, K_under is option strike (ITM intrinsic, not OTM distance). New singular fixture test `max_pain_fixture_asymmetric_chain.sql` (TC-16) added to T-16/T-19 to assert the swap on a 1,000-call-at-20 / 1,000-put-at-30 asymmetric synthetic chain. (2) iv_rank rewritten in T-3 row 52 + T-13 line 377 as a chronological rolling 252-day percentile (window ORDER BY trading_date, counting prior non-null iv30 ≤ current), implemented via a self-join against the trailing slice. The round-1 `percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY iv30 ROWS 251 PRECEDING)` was both SQL-standard ambiguous (DuckDB rejects frames on ranking functions) and semantically wrong (orders by magnitude, not time). New singular fixture `iv_rank_fixture_synthetic_252d.sql` (TC-17) asserts the chronological semantics on a known monotonic 252-day fixture. (3) `gme_ads_market_dashboard` materialised as `view` (was `table`) in T-6 + T-15 so `most_recent_session_close_ts_utc`, `pull_lag_hours`, `is_stale` re-evaluate at every dashboard query; T-14 columns and T-17 banner spec updated to document query-time evaluation; TL-4 updated. (4) T-11 `front_expiry_flag` tightened to nearest expiry STRICTLY AFTER `trading_date` via a two-CTE form (DuckDB does not allow FILTER inside window functions); T-14 `max_pain_strike_front` subquery simplified to reference `front_expiry_flag = TRUE`, so dealer_net_gamma, gex_zero_cross_strike, and max_pain_strike_front share one 'front' definition on weekly-expiration days. (5) T-13 iv30 step 1 now restricts numerator and denominator to the same `sigma IS NOT NULL` rowset, removing the NULL-IV bias. (D) T-13 `gex_zero_cross_strike` step 5 explicit exact-zero substitution rule: `K* = K_above` (or `K_below`) when the corresponding endpoint is exactly zero. (E) T-3 row 53 `dealer_net_gamma` calculation now references `front_expiry_flag = TRUE` (was undefined `front_expiry_date`). T-1 changelog row 0.2 added documenting the round-2 iteration. tdd_signed remains false pending Phase B.5 round-2 review.

Phase B item-A patch + sign per orchestrator directive `fcd99bc4` after reviewer `1bd13822` (Phase B.5 round-2 verdict: approve, conditional on item A). T-13 iv_rank percentile LEFT JOIN replaced the calendar-day `INTERVAL '500 days'` window with the trading-day `dim_date` OFFSET-251 form so the join slice pins to exactly 252 prior trading-days per BRD §B-3 (round-2 draft over-sampled to ~344 trading days in steady state). TC-17 fixture extended from 252 → 400 days so any future window drift becomes detectable. T-1 changelog row 0.3 added; signature block filled. mart.yml.phase = B_signed, tdd_signed = true. Phase C scaffold unblocked.

Phase C scaffold per orchestrator directive `fcd99bc4`. dbt project structure under examples/gme-options-mart/: dbt_project.yml, profiles.yml (motherduck + local DuckDB targets), 4 seed CSVs (dim_holidays, dim_macro_events, gme_seed_options_chain_snapshot [132 rows], gme_seed_price_history [60 trading days]), 12 models across 5 layers (2 ODS, 3 DIM, 3 DWD, 4 DWS, 1 ADS), seeds/schema.yml + models/schema.yml with 8 TC-* generic tests, 7 singular SQL tests in tests/ matching TDD T-19 inventory (max_pain_in_strike_set, max_pain_fixture_asymmetric_chain, dealer_net_gamma_neq_net_gex, dealer_net_gamma_scope_distinct, iv_rank_implies_label_final, iv_rank_fixture_synthetic_400d, gex_zero_cross_in_strike_set), Streamlit dashboard with clickable link-status badges + phase-gated iv_rank logic, dqc_scorecard.json + coverage_manifest.json shells for Phase D to populate, .github/workflows/gme-mart-ci.yml (dbt seed+run+test against local DuckDB target in CI; MotherDuck path opt-in via secret). Item B carry-forward applied to T-14 ADS: most_recent_session_close_ts_utc uses MAX(calendar_date + 21h WHERE calendar_date + 21h <= now()) form so pull_lag_hours stays in [0, ∞) (closes Phase B.5 advisory B per orchestrator directive `fcd99bc4`). Awaiting Phase C.5 build verification.

Phase C round-2 iteration per orchestrator directive `e6bfd2d9` against Phase C.5 round-1 reviewer verdict `32905cfb` (3 blockers + 3 majors). Closes findings: (F1) TC-08 dealer_net_gamma_scope_distinct.sql row-count assertion rewritten — round-1 OR clause `(fc_rows > fm_rows + 0 AND NOT (fc_rows > fm_rows))` collapsed to FALSE leaving only the label check; new form fails the test iff back-month rows exist in gme_dwd_options_chain_greeks AND fc_rows <= fm_rows (load-bearing structural predicate). (F2) TC-16 and TC-17 now ref the production models via seed fixtures planted at far-future trading_dates outside dim_date 2020-2027 real-data range. seeds/test_fixtures/max_pain_asymmetric_chain.csv: 1000 calls @ K=20 + 2000 puts @ K=30 at 2099-12-31; correct max_pain_strike=30, broken (swapped K/K_under) tie-breaks to 20. seeds/test_fixtures/iv_rank_synthetic_400d_chain.csv + iv_rank_synthetic_400d_price.csv: 400 fixture trading_dates at 2098-01-01..2099-02-04, bimodal iv30 (0.5 for first 200, 0.3 for last 200) so the chronological percentile yields ~56% for the last row while a broken percent_rank-by-magnitude would return 0%. ODS chain + price models UNION ALL the fixture seeds; dim_date generator extended 2020-2100 so the relationships test stays green. (F3) gme_dws_perf_implied_vol.sql ranked_expiries replaced with separate near (T<=30/365) and far (T>30/365) CTEs joined via FULL OUTER JOIN so (T_near, T_far) brackets are correctly identified on multi-near-expiry chains (round-1 ROW_NUMBER ordered all near before all far and routinely picked rn=2 from the near side, forcing extrapolation). (M4) gme_dws_perf_dealer_gamma_front_month.sql gex_zero_cross_strike candidate filter now precomputes sign_at_or_before and sign_at_or_after per row using LAST_VALUE / FIRST_VALUE IGNORE NULLS, and registers a candidate iff sign_below_eff * sign_above_eff < 0. Exact-zero touches that do not change running sign (e.g. cum_gex sequence [+5, 0, +7]) no longer flag. (M5) dashboard/app.py resolve_status() reads iv_rank_link_status_active from the ADS view as the single source of truth for the unsupported→proxy phase-gated flip; previous two-place re-derivation from lookback_days removed. (M6) Dead render_badge function removed. dbt seed (7/7) + run (13/13) + test (47/47) all PASS against local DuckDB target. Awaiting Phase C.5 round-2 review.

Phase C round-3 single-file patch + sign per orchestrator directive `dd0fca3e` after reviewer `33cc262a` (Phase C.5 round-2 verdict: approve-on-one-mechanical-fix). gme_ads_market_dashboard.sql latest_date CTE now gates on `pull_ts_utc <= now()` in both the price-eod side and the options-chain side, so future-dated TC-16/TC-17 fixture rows at 2098-2099 are excluded from the dashboard's `latest_date` picker by construction. Verified end-to-end: ADS view now resolves trading_date = 2026-06-01 (real data) instead of 2099-02-04 (fixture leak from round-2). TDD §T-14 trading_date row updated to document the pull_ts_utc <= now() restriction. TC-17 fixture test header comment refreshed to reflect the widened dim_date (2020-2100) — the OFFSET-251 cutoff from 2099-02-04 now lands ~2098-02-04 not late-2026 as the round-2 comment claimed; the [40, 60] band remains correct and tolerant. mart.yml.phase = C_signed. dbt seed (7/7) + run (13/13) + test (47/47) all PASS on local target. Phase D /mart-dqc unblocked.
